intention: 某东西被强制修改了（通用技术场景）
sentencePatterns: [Something] have been forcibly modified without [authorization / notice].
It appears that [something] have been forcibly modified by [cause].
realLifeExamples: The configuration files have been forcibly modified by the deployment script.
The menu bar styles have been forcibly modified by an external plugin.
usageNotes: forcibly is the adverb form of force. Never use force directly as an adverb before a past participle. forcibly modified = changed against the intended behavior or without authorization.
productionPrompts: 用 have been forcibly modified 描述一次配置或样式被意外改动的情况。
